sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.dueDate,t.startedDate,t.completedDate,ws.stageName,ws.sortOrder AS stageSortOrder,u.displayName AS assignedUserName,tm.teamName AS assignedTeamName,r.roleName AS assignedRoleName FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=t.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=t.assignedToRoleId WHERE t.workflowId=:workflowId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY ws.sortOrder,t.id
